steps.title: Group terms by variable
steps.content: The expression $(8yz)(y)(7z)$ contains coefficients 8 and 7, and each variable appears multiple times. Regroup by type: $(8 \cdot 7) \cdot (y \cdot y) \cdot (z \cdot z)$

steps.title: Multiply and apply exponent rules
steps.content:
Multiply the coefficients: $8 \times 7 = 56$
Combine $y$ terms: $y \cdot y = y^2$
Combine $z$ terms: $z \cdot z = z^2$
Result: $56y^2z^2$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
